name: engineering-workflow
description: Unified engineering workflow: alignment → PRD → vertical-slice issues → AFK handoff → TDD execution → architectural sanity → triage. Run /init-workflow once per repo to seed the pipeline order in CLAUDE.md. Skills: grill-with-docs, context-bootstrap, to-prd, to-issues, agent-brief, triage, tdd-vertical, diagnose, zoom-out, deep-modules. v2.3.0: /to-issues now generates the agent brief inline for every AFK slice (closes the gap where /triage was being skipped, leaving issues in ready-for-agent without a brief). /agent-brief gains a Reality-anchored principle + Real resources template section that validates concrete refs (table.column, endpoint, topic, key) against .sandcastle/probes/*.schema if cached.
